text.title: Log Collection with Filebeat and Elastic Beats Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

conclusion.verdict: Filebeat host-agent via systemd; static input list
Use Fluent Bit instead (lower per-event overhead)

text.example: substrate=kubernetes → DaemonSet + autodiscover. References rule daemonset-on-k8s.
